title: 「As if / As though」句型
titleZh: 「As if / As though」句：表達「好像……一樣」
titleEn: Using As if / As though to mean ‘as though something were true’

source.file: Sentence Structure 76 -「As if _ As though 句」.pdf
omissions: English versions of Chinese-only Important Rules and Benefits explanations are faithful editorial translations.

formula: Main clause + as if / as though + subject + verb + other information

formulas.formula: Main clause + as if / as though + subject + verb + other information
as if / as though + subject + had + past participle

example: He talks as if he owned the place.
exampleZh: 他說話的樣子，好像這個地方是他的一樣。

examples.en: He talks as if he owned the place.
examples.zh: 他說話的樣子，好像這個地方是他的一樣。

examples.en: John was eating very messily, as though he had not eaten for days.
examples.zh: John 吃得非常狼狽，好像已經多天沒有吃過東西一樣。
examples.highlight: as though he had not eaten

meaning.zh: As if 和 as though 都表示「好像……」、「彷彿……」或「看起來就像……」，大部分情況下可以互換。

rules.zh: As if 和 as though 的意思大致相同，在大部分句子中可以互換。
rules.en: As if and as though have approximately the same meaning and are interchangeable in most sentences.

rules.zh: 當說話者認為後面的情況可能是真的，可以按照正常時間使用現在式、過去式或完成式。
rules.en: Use a normal tense when the situation may be true.

rules.zh: 當後面的情況並非事實或不大可能是真的，通常使用過去式。
rules.en: Use the past tense for a present situation that is unreal or unlikely.

rules.zh: 如果想像的事情發生在過去，通常使用過去完成式。
rules.en: Use had + past participle for an unreal past situation.

rules.zh: 在較正式或標準的英語中，假設或不真實的情況通常一律使用 were。
rules.en: In formal or standard English, use were for an unreal situation with every subject.

rules.zh: As if / as though 後面通常必須有包含主語和動詞的完整小句。
rules.en: A complete clause with a subject and verb normally follows as if or as though.

rules.zh: 不要把 as if + 完整小句 與 like + 名詞 混淆。
rules.en: Do not confuse as if + clause with like + noun.

rules.zh: As if / as though 常用於 look、sound、feel、seem、act、behave、talk、react 等動詞之後。
rules.en: Common main-clause verbs include look, sound, feel, seem, act, behave, talk and react.

benefits.zh: 它不只說明一個人做了甚麼，還可以描述他的動作、語氣或表情給人的感覺。
benefits.en: It describes a person’s behaviour or appearance more vividly.

benefits.zh: 它能根據外表、聲音或行為表達印象，而不把猜測斷定為事實。
benefits.en: It expresses an impression without presenting a guess as a fact.

benefits.zh: 它把實際看到的情況和給人的印象自然地連接起來。
benefits.en: It joins the observed situation and the impression naturally.

benefits.zh: 它可以清楚指出某人的行為與事實並不相符，適合表達批評、幽默、驚訝或誇張。
benefits.en: It clearly expresses an unreal or exaggerated comparison.

benefits.zh: As if / as though 很適合用於故事、作文和口語描述，讓讀者更容易想像畫面。
benefits.en: It makes stories and descriptions more vivid.

benefits.zh: It looks as if...、It sounds as though... 等句框可幫助你快速組織答案。
benefits.en: It provides practical frames for speaking and writing.

sourceOmissions: English versions of Chinese-only Important Rules and Benefits explanations are faithful editorial translations.

en: Rewrite each sentence using as if or as though.
Preserve the original meaning and choose the correct tense.
The first word of each answer has been provided.
zh: 使用 as if 或 as though 改寫以下句子。
答案須保留原意，並按照真實、非真實或過去的情況選擇正確時態。
每題已提供答案的第一個字。

questions.prompt: Mia’s face gives the impression that she is tired.
questions.promptZh: 米婭的神情令人覺得她很疲倦。
questions.answer: Mia looks as if she is tired.
questions.answerZh: 米婭看起來好像很疲倦。
questions.highlight: Mia looks as if she is tired.

questions.prompt: The smell of the soup makes us think that it is burning.
questions.promptZh: 湯的氣味令人覺得它正在燒焦。
questions.answer: The soup smells as though it is burning.
questions.answerZh: 湯聞起來好像正在燒焦。
questions.highlight: The soup smells as though it is burning.

questions.prompt: From the baby’s cries, he seems to be hungry.
questions.promptZh: 從嬰兒的哭聲判斷，他看來肚餓了。
questions.answer: The baby sounds as if he is hungry.
questions.answerZh: 嬰兒的聲音聽起來好像肚餓了。
questions.highlight: The baby sounds as if he is hungry.

questions.prompt: Daniel is walking in a way that suggests his leg hurts.
questions.promptZh: 丹尼爾走路的樣子顯示他的腿在痛。
questions.answer: Daniel walks as though his leg hurts.
questions.answerZh: 丹尼爾走路時好像腿在痛。
questions.highlight: Daniel walks as though his leg hurts.

questions.prompt: When we enter the room, we get the impression that it is becoming colder.
questions.promptZh: 我們進入房間時，覺得室內正變得愈來愈冷。
questions.answer: The room feels as if it is becoming colder.
questions.answerZh: 房間感覺好像正變得愈來愈冷。
questions.highlight: The room feels as if it is becoming colder.

questions.prompt: Ava answers confidently, giving the impression that she knows the answer.
questions.promptZh: 艾娃自信地回答，令人覺得她知道答案。
questions.answer: Ava answers as though she knows the answer.
questions.answerZh: 艾娃回答時，好像她知道答案一樣。
questions.highlight: Ava answers as though she knows the answer.

questions.prompt: The dog is shaking, which makes it seem frightened.
questions.promptZh: 這隻狗正在發抖，看來感到很害怕。
questions.answer: The dog is shaking as if it is frightened.
questions.answerZh: 這隻狗正在發抖，好像感到很害怕。
questions.highlight: The dog is shaking as if it is frightened.

questions.prompt: The sky is very dark, and it seems likely that it is going to rain.
questions.promptZh: 天空非常昏暗，看來很可能快要下雨。
questions.answer: The sky looks as though it is going to rain.
questions.answerZh: 天空看起來好像快要下雨。
questions.highlight: The sky looks as though it is going to rain.

questions.prompt: Ethan’s voice makes him sound like someone with a cold.
questions.promptZh: 伊森的聲音聽起來像是感冒了。
questions.answer: Ethan sounds as if he has a cold.
questions.answerZh: 伊森聽起來好像感冒了。
questions.highlight: Ethan sounds as if he has a cold.

questions.prompt: The computer is behaving strangely, which suggests that something is wrong.
questions.promptZh: 電腦表現異常，顯示有些東西出了問題。
questions.answer: The computer is behaving as though something is wrong.
questions.answerZh: 電腦的表現好像有些東西出了問題。
questions.highlight: The computer is behaving as though something is wrong.

questions.prompt: Leo does not know everything, but the way he talks suggests that he does.
questions.promptZh: 里奧並非甚麼都知道，但他說話的方式令人覺得他甚麼都懂。
questions.answer: Leo talks as if he knew everything.
questions.answerZh: 里奧說話時，好像自己甚麼都知道一樣。
questions.highlight: Leo talks as if he knew everything.

questions.prompt: Nina is not rich, but she spends money like a rich person.
questions.promptZh: 妮娜並不富有，但她花錢的方式像個富人。
questions.answer: Nina spends money as though she were rich.
questions.answerZh: 妮娜花錢時，好像自己很富有一樣。
questions.highlight: Nina spends money as though she were rich.

questions.prompt: Ben is not the manager, but he orders everyone around like the manager.
questions.promptZh: 本並不是經理，但他像經理一樣命令所有人。
questions.answer: Ben orders everyone around as if he were the manager.
questions.answerZh: 本命令所有人時，好像自己是經理一樣。
questions.highlight: Ben orders everyone around as if he were the manager.

questions.prompt: The problem is minor, but Chloe’s complaints make it sound like a disaster.
questions.promptZh: 問題並不嚴重，但克洛伊的投訴令事情聽起來像一場災難。
questions.answer: Chloe complains as though the problem were a disaster.
questions.answerZh: 克洛伊投訴時，好像這個問題是一場災難一樣。
questions.highlight: Chloe complains as though the problem were a disaster.

questions.prompt: The toy is made of plastic, but the child carries it with the care normally used for glass.
questions.promptZh: 玩具是塑膠製的，但這個孩子拿着它時，像拿着玻璃一樣小心。
questions.answer: The child carries the toy as if it were made of glass.
questions.answerZh: 這個孩子拿着玩具時，好像它是玻璃製的一樣。
questions.highlight: The child carries the toy as if it were made of glass.

questions.prompt: The office does not belong to Omar, but he treats it like his own property.
questions.promptZh: 辦公室並不屬於奧馬爾，但他把它當作自己的地方。
questions.answer: Omar treats the office as though it belonged to him.
questions.answerZh: 奧馬爾把辦公室當作好像是屬於自己的一樣。
questions.highlight: Omar treats the office as though it belonged to him.

questions.prompt: Grace knows me well, but she looks at me in a way that suggests she does not recognise me.
questions.promptZh: 格蕾絲很熟悉我，但她看着我的樣子，好像認不出我。
questions.answer: Grace looks at me as if she did not recognise me.
questions.answerZh: 格蕾絲看着我，好像認不出我一樣。
questions.highlight: Grace looks at me as if she did not recognise me.

questions.prompt: The audience members are adults, but Marcus speaks to them like children.
questions.promptZh: 觀眾都是成年人，但馬庫斯跟他們說話時，像在跟小孩子說話。
questions.answer: Marcus speaks to the audience as though they were children.
questions.answerZh: 馬庫斯跟觀眾說話時，好像他們是小孩子一樣。
questions.highlight: Marcus speaks to the audience as though they were children.

questions.prompt: The price was only slightly higher. The customer reacted in a way that suggested it was completely unreasonable.
questions.promptZh: 價錢只是稍為提高，但顧客的反應令人覺得這個價格完全不合理。
questions.answer: The customer reacted as if the price were completely unreasonable.
questions.answerZh: 顧客的反應好像這個價格完全不合理一樣。
questions.highlight: The customer reacted as if the price were completely unreasonable.

questions.prompt: The rules apply to Aisha, but she behaves in a way that suggests they do not.
questions.promptZh: 規則同樣適用於艾莎，但她的行為好像這些規則不適用於她。
questions.answer: Aisha behaves as though the rules did not apply to her.
questions.answerZh: 艾莎的行為好像這些規則不適用於她一樣。
questions.highlight: Aisha behaves as though the rules did not apply to her.

questions.prompt: Emma stared at the empty chair, and her face suggested that she had seen a ghost.
questions.promptZh: 艾瑪凝視着空椅子，她的神情令人覺得她見到鬼一樣。
questions.answer: Emma stared at the empty chair as if she had seen a ghost.
questions.answerZh: 艾瑪凝視着空椅子，好像見到鬼一樣。
questions.highlight: Emma stared at the empty chair as if she had seen a ghost.

questions.prompt: Jason rushed to the table with the hunger of someone who had not eaten all day.
questions.promptZh: 傑森衝到餐桌旁，飢餓得像整天沒有吃過東西的人。
questions.answer: Jason rushed to the table as though he had not eaten all day.
questions.answerZh: 傑森衝到餐桌旁，好像整天沒有吃過東西一樣。
questions.highlight: Jason rushed to the table as though he had not eaten all day.

questions.prompt: The wet floor suggested that someone had spilled a bucket of water.
questions.promptZh: 濕漉漉的地板令人覺得有人倒瀉了一桶水。
questions.answer: The floor looked as if someone had spilled a bucket of water.
questions.answerZh: 地板看起來好像有人倒瀉了一桶水。
questions.highlight: The floor looked as if someone had spilled a bucket of water.

questions.prompt: Noah’s relieved expression suggested that he had received good news.
questions.promptZh: 諾亞如釋重負的表情令人覺得他收到了好消息。
questions.answer: Noah looked relieved as though he had received good news.
questions.answerZh: 諾亞看起來如釋重負，好像收到了好消息。
questions.highlight: Noah looked relieved as though he had received good news.

questions.prompt: The children looked as tired as people who had run a long race.
questions.promptZh: 孩子們看起來像跑完長途賽跑的人一樣疲倦。
questions.answer: The children looked as if they had run a long race.
questions.answerZh: 孩子們看起來好像剛跑完一場長途賽跑。
questions.highlight: The children looked as if they had run a long race.

questions.prompt: The package was undamaged, but Maya examined it with the care she would use after serious damage.
questions.promptZh: 包裹並沒有損壞，但瑪雅檢查它時，就像它曾受到嚴重破壞一樣小心。
questions.answer: Maya examined the package as though it had been seriously damaged.
questions.answerZh: 瑪雅檢查包裹時，好像它曾受到嚴重破壞一樣。
questions.highlight: Maya examined the package as though it had been seriously damaged.

questions.prompt: The teacher paused, giving the impression that she had forgotten what to say.
questions.promptZh: 老師停了下來，令人覺得她忘記了要說甚麼。
questions.answer: The teacher paused as if she had forgotten what to say.
questions.answerZh: 老師停了下來，好像忘記了要說甚麼。
questions.highlight: The teacher paused as if she had forgotten what to say.

questions.prompt: Ethan suddenly looked towards the door. He seemed to have heard a strange noise.
questions.promptZh: 伊森突然望向門口。他似乎聽到了一些奇怪的聲音。
questions.answer: Ethan looked towards the door as though he had heard a strange noise.
questions.answerZh: 伊森望向門口，好像聽到了一些奇怪的聲音。
questions.highlight: Ethan looked towards the door as though he had heard a strange noise.

questions.prompt: The team had won only the first match, but they celebrated like winners of the final.
questions.promptZh: 球隊只贏了第一場比賽，但他們慶祝得像贏了決賽一樣。
questions.answer: The team celebrated as if they had won the final.
questions.answerZh: 球隊慶祝得好像已經贏了決賽一樣。
questions.highlight: The team celebrated as if they had won the final.

questions.prompt: Olivia caused only a small part of the problem, but she apologised like the person responsible for all of it.
questions.promptZh: 奧莉花只造成了問題的一小部分，但她道歉時像整個問題都是由她引起的。
questions.answer: Olivia apologised as though she had caused the whole problem.
questions.answerZh: 奧莉花道歉時，好像整個問題都是由她造成的。
questions.highlight: Olivia apologised as though she had caused the whole problem.

questions.prompt: Why is Sam whispering? His behaviour suggests that someone is sleeping nearby.
questions.promptZh: 山姆為甚麼正在低聲說話？他的行為顯示附近可能有人正在睡覺。
questions.answer: Sam is whispering as if someone is sleeping nearby.
questions.answerZh: 山姆低聲說話，好像附近有人正在睡覺。
questions.highlight: Sam is whispering as if someone is sleeping nearby.

questions.prompt: The repeated flashing of the lights suggests that the building is losing power.
questions.promptZh: 燈光不斷閃爍，顯示大樓可能正失去電力供應。
questions.answer: The lights keep flashing as though the building is losing power.
questions.answerZh: 燈光不斷閃爍，好像大樓正失去電力供應。
questions.highlight: The lights keep flashing as though the building is losing power.

questions.prompt: The man held the map upside down, but he behaved like someone who understood it.
questions.promptZh: 那名男子把地圖倒轉拿着，但他的表現像是看得明白一樣。
questions.answer: The man held the map upside down as if he understood it.
questions.answerZh: 那名男子把地圖倒轉拿着，卻好像看得明白一樣。
questions.highlight: The man held the map upside down as if he understood it.

questions.prompt: Do not speak to me in the way adults speak to a child.
questions.promptZh: 不要用成年人跟小孩子說話的方式跟我說話。
questions.answer: Do not speak to me as if I were a child.
questions.answerZh: 不要跟我說話時，好像我是個小孩子一樣。
questions.highlight: Do not speak to me as if I were a child.

questions.prompt: The machine sounds unusual. It seems that a part has come loose.
questions.promptZh: 這部機器聽起來不正常，似乎有零件鬆脫了。
questions.answer: The machine sounds as though a part has come loose.
questions.answerZh: 這部機器聽起來好像有零件鬆脫了。
questions.highlight: The machine sounds as though a part has come loose.

questions.prompt: She smiled in a way that suggested she knew a secret.
questions.promptZh: 她微笑的樣子令人覺得她知道一個秘密。
questions.answer: She smiled as if she knew a secret.
questions.answerZh: 她微笑時，好像知道一個秘密。
questions.highlight: She smiled as if she knew a secret.

questions.prompt: The wind hit the windows in a way that suggested a storm was approaching.
questions.promptZh: 風猛烈地吹打窗戶，令人覺得暴風雨正在迫近。
questions.answer: The wind hit the windows as though a storm was approaching.
questions.answerZh: 風吹打窗戶時，好像暴風雨正在迫近。
questions.highlight: The wind hit the windows as though a storm was approaching.

questions.prompt: You are describing the exam in a way that makes it sound impossible.
questions.promptZh: 你描述這場考試的方式，令人覺得它根本不可能完成。
questions.answer: You are describing the exam as if it were impossible.
questions.answerZh: 你描述這場考試時，好像它根本不可能完成一樣。
questions.highlight: You are describing the exam as if it were impossible.

questions.prompt: The receptionist greeted us warmly, giving the impression that she had known us for years.
questions.promptZh: 接待員熱情地迎接我們，令人覺得她已經認識我們多年。
questions.answer: The receptionist greeted us as though she had known us for years.
questions.answerZh: 接待員迎接我們時，好像已經認識我們多年。
questions.highlight: The receptionist greeted us as though she had known us for years.

questions.prompt: The actor performed in a way that made the audience believe he really was the king.
questions.promptZh: 演員的表演令觀眾覺得他真的就是國王。
questions.answer: The actor performed as if he were the king.
questions.answerZh: 演員表演時，好像自己就是國王一樣。
questions.highlight: The actor performed as if he were the king.

questions.prompt: Peter had never used the software before, but he clicked through the menus with the confidence of someone who had used it many times.
questions.promptZh: 彼得以前從未使用過這個軟件，但他按選單時，像已經使用過很多次一樣有信心。
questions.answer: Peter clicked through the menus as though he had used the software many times before.
questions.answerZh: 彼得按選單時，好像以前已經使用過這個軟件很多次。
questions.highlight: Peter clicked through the menus as though he had used the software many times before.

questions.prompt: The delay was minor, but the committee discussed it with the seriousness of a national emergency.
questions.promptZh: 延誤並不嚴重，但委員會討論這件事時，嚴肅得像發生了全國緊急事故。
questions.answer: The committee discussed the minor delay as if it were a national emergency.
questions.answerZh: 委員會討論這次輕微延誤時，好像它是一場全國緊急事故。
questions.highlight: The committee discussed the minor delay as if it were a national emergency.

questions.prompt: The shop was still open, but the staff started packing up and gave the impression that the day had ended.
questions.promptZh: 商店仍然營業，但職員開始收拾東西，令人覺得一天的工作已經結束。
questions.answer: The staff started packing up as though the day had ended.
questions.answerZh: 職員開始收拾東西，好像一天的工作已經結束。
questions.highlight: The staff started packing up as though the day had ended.

questions.prompt: The witness described the event with the certainty of someone who had been standing beside the driver.
questions.promptZh: 目擊者非常肯定地描述事件，像當時一直站在司機旁邊一樣。
questions.answer: The witness described the event as if she had been standing beside the driver.
questions.answerZh: 目擊者描述事件時，好像當時一直站在司機旁邊。
questions.highlight: The witness described the event as if she had been standing beside the driver.

questions.prompt: Raj kept checking the locked door. His behaviour suggested that someone might try to enter.
questions.promptZh: 拉傑不斷檢查已上鎖的門。他的行為令人覺得可能有人會嘗試進入。
questions.answer: Raj kept checking the locked door as though someone might try to enter.
questions.answerZh: 拉傑不斷檢查已上鎖的門，好像可能有人會嘗試進入。
questions.highlight: Raj kept checking the locked door as though someone might try to enter.

questions.prompt: The manager dismissed every suggestion and behaved like a person who believed only his own opinion mattered.
questions.promptZh: 經理否定了所有建議，表現得像只有他自己的意見才重要。
questions.answer: The manager dismissed every suggestion as if only his own opinion mattered.
questions.answerZh: 經理否定所有建議，好像只有他自己的意見才重要。
questions.highlight: The manager dismissed every suggestion as if only his own opinion mattered.

questions.prompt: The patient walked slowly and carefully. Anyone watching might think that the floor was covered with ice.
questions.promptZh: 病人緩慢而小心地走路。旁人可能會以為地面鋪滿了冰。
questions.answer: The patient walked as though the floor were covered with ice.
questions.answerZh: 病人走路時，好像地面鋪滿了冰。
questions.highlight: The patient walked as though the floor were covered with ice.

questions.prompt: After the short meeting, Tom looked as exhausted as someone who had worked without rest for several days.
questions.promptZh: 短短的會議結束後，湯姆看起來像連續工作了數天而沒有休息一樣疲倦。
questions.answer: Tom looked as if he had worked without rest for several days.
questions.answerZh: 湯姆看起來好像已經連續工作數天而沒有休息。
questions.highlight: Tom looked as if he had worked without rest for several days.

questions.prompt: The city became silent within minutes, giving visitors the impression that everyone had disappeared.
questions.promptZh: 城市在數分鐘內變得寂靜，令訪客覺得所有人都消失了。
questions.answer: The city became silent as though everyone had disappeared.
questions.answerZh: 城市變得寂靜，好像所有人都消失了。
questions.highlight: The city became silent as though everyone had disappeared.

questions.prompt: The spokesperson paused repeatedly while answering each question. This suggested that she was trying to remember a prepared statement.
questions.promptZh: 發言人在回答每條問題時不斷停頓，令人覺得她正在努力記起預先準備好的說話。
questions.answer: The spokesperson paused repeatedly while answering each question, as if she were trying to remember a prepared statement.
questions.answerZh: 發言人在回答每條問題時不斷停頓，好像正在努力記起預先準備好的說話。
